description:
Create an interactive tiddler titled 'Interactive Deployment Generator' tagged with 'DevOps' and 'Runbook'. The tiddler must provide input fields for application name, image tag, and port number, bound to the state tiddlers '$:/state/deploy/app', '$:/state/deploy/tag', and '$:/state/deploy/port'. Below the inputs, display two code blocks that reactively update to show the following deployment commands:

Docker Command:
docker run -d --name <APP> -p <PORT>:80 myregistry.internal/<APP>:<TAG>

Kubernetes Command:
kubectl create deployment <APP> --image=myregistry.internal/<APP>:<TAG> --port=<PORT>
